name: Beyond Putt - Create Your Own Mini Golf

reviews.review_title: ⛳✨ Mini Golf Fun with Creative Freedom
reviews.review_description:
Beyond Putt – Create Your Own Mini Golf is a solid and polished mini golf experience with realistic assets and very satisfying physics. Shots feel accurate and consistent, making each course enjoyable to play.

There are plenty of fun levels to discover, with varied and well-designed environments that keep things fresh. The Mixed Reality mode is a highlight, cleverly focusing on selected elements in your real space for a clean and immersive setup.

On top of that, the creator mode lets your creativity run wild, giving the game strong replay value beyond the standard courses.

A very pleasant, well-rounded mini golf title that delivers both fun and flexibility. Highly recommended ⛳🎉
Game has alot of potential.  I wish multi-player would work well. Have issues getting invites to work.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback—we’re glad you see the potential in Beyond Putt! The multiplayer invite system currently only lists friends who also own the game, which may be causing some confusion. We’re working to make this clearer and improve the overall multiplayer experience. If you have more details or suggestions to share, feel free to contact us at salesandservice@biswagames.com. Your input truly helps us improve!

reviews.review_description: This game is pretty cool, but still needs some tweaking, hence the feedback since it's still being created. I do like being able to play in pass through, which keeps me from stepping on my dog. Being able to use the joystick to move in VR mode is nice. I have noticed the club moves the ball before it even touches it, which makes it harder to gage my shots. I'll be moving the club to get in the correct place, and with a gap between the club and ball, the ball moves. There is one hole in passthrough mode that is way too hard. I don't know which letter or number it is, as it doesn't show when you hover over the hole on the menu. It's similar to skee-ball game arcade game. I gave up after 23 shots. Consider this addition to the game. If someone gets double or triple over, to just move on to the next hole.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your detailed feedback! We’re really glad you’re enjoying pass-through mode—and it’s great to hear it’s helping with spatial awareness (and keeping pets safe! 🐶).

The issue with the club moving the ball before contact has been resolved in version 2.0.50, along with other refinements to improve gameplay.

As for the challenging hole in pass-through mode, we appreciate you pointing it out! We’re always looking to balance difficulty, and your suggestion about moving on after a certain number of strokes is definitely something we’re considering.

If you have any more feedback or suggestions, feel free to reach out at salesandservice@biswagames.com—we’d love to hear your thoughts as we continue improving Beyond Putt!

reviews.review_description:
*Updated review #3 Thanks for the quick response and solution for easier movement. It's great! I can tell you care about this app a lot which means it'll only get better. Yes I'm on a Quest 2 but don't understand why MR wouldn't work because I have it on several other apps. If you can fix that or at least warn customers that MR won't work on Quest 2 I'd be happy to give the game a better rating/review. I really appreciate the quick response from you!  Not sure I'd keep the app tho. It'll be awhile before I upgrade to Quest 3. 

*Getting in position to hit the ball, there is no way to turn around so the ball ends up being behind me and I spend a great deal of time trying to position myself so I'm facing the ball. 

*Where is the Christmas scene with the trees and candy canes that I see in all your ads? Nowhere to be found in the choices.
 
Other than that, the courses are pretty nice. Some better than others, not quite as cool as Walk About Mini Golf but I still liked 3 of them a lot and with Mixed reality this game would have a feature Walk About doesn't. Hitting the ball is realistic.  This game can be good, but without MR and ability to move/turn around so you can face the ball, it's annoying instead of fun. I'd be happy to change this review if it improves (if I decide to keep the game). If I return the game, I'll take this review down if I hear from other players that these issues have been fixed. Like I said...this game can be nice, it just isn't there yet.

developer_response.body: Thank you for updating the review & Rating based on new Game Updates. Regarding Quest 2, MR capabilities are minimal compared to Quest 3. We dont support MR on Quest 2

reviews.review_description: I like the look and feel as it is now... however, it needs the ability to adjust your grip on the putter. The way it is now the grip is extremely awkward. Also I would like to be able to move with the stick to the area of the ball, then fine tune where the ball is in relation to my stance by moving physically. Eventhough I have a 10 X 10 space for VR gaming, I have hit the wall twice in the short time I have played it. Keep up the good work, looking forward to future evolutions of this game!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your thoughtful review and for sharing your experience with Beyond Putt! We’re so glad you’re enjoying the look and feel of the game—it means a lot to hear your encouragement!

We’re excited to let you know that the game includes joystick-based movement, allowing you to navigate to the ball more easily and fine-tune your stance physically. This should help avoid those wall encounters, even in larger play areas.

As for the grip adjustment, that’s a great suggestion! We’ve taken steps to address this with updates aimed at improving overall comfort and usability.

Your feedback helps us continue to evolve and make the game even better. Thanks for sticking with us—we can’t wait to hear what you think of the next updates!

Happy putting! 🏌️‍♂️✨

reviews.review_description: Love the mixed-reality version. I played it in multiple rooms and the game automatically customized itself according to my room. Worth the money.

I don't like leaving a bad review as I'm sure the developers have put a lot of work in. Unfortunately this game promises mixed reality, but it's nowhere to be found! I really wanted mini golf courses in mixed reality. This is a single player only game, with no AI to play against, and no scoring or timers to try and beat your previous games. When you start you have to slowly walk over to the golf club bag and then back to where the ball is. I'm not sure why you'd need any club that isn't a putter? But there's a choice of clubs anyway. I've only tried the putter but quite often the ball seems to jump under or over the putter and sometimes ends up being hit backwards. There's a lot of things that need fixing, but there is some potential for a good game here!

developer_response.body: Sorry that you faced such a problem. Few users faced such issues post v66 update but now we have updated the game and it's fully working. In case you have any other problems or questions do not hesitate to get in touch with us at salesandservice@biswagames.com

reviews.review_description: Possibly the worst VR golf game ever made.

developer_response.body: We recommend that you use Putter to start with. Wedge, Driver, etc can provide advantages on a case-to-case basis. In the Beginning, if you are not well in. control of the wedge, it can lead to the ball moving out of the playing area and restarting the game.
